name: MCA Inclusive Expressions
description: Core enhancement mod for MCA Reborn (Minecraft Comes Alive) providing dedicated Breast sub-tabs, nested sub-categories ([ Size ], [ Position ], [ Rotation ]), 100% independent 3D left and right breast model part MatrixStack scaling, native MCA 0%-100% default scale alignment, orthogonal 6-axis 3D position customization ignoring rotation angles (Up is Up, Left is Left, Forward is Forward), 3-axis 3D Euler rotation control (Pitch X, Yaw Y, Roll Z), universal 4-viewport synchronization across Real World, GUI Settings, Paper Dolls HUD, and Inventory Character View, 100% individualized genetic NBT persistence engine, dedicated bolded GameRule category and lang localization, foreground tooltip rendering engine, real-time 3D model preview rendering, and gender-inclusive body feature customization.
